boundaryAssertions.ownerResponsibility: PRD registration, scope decision log, role-scoped task decomposition, evidence and human-gate routing.
boundaryAssertions.forbiddenOwnershipTransfer: Does not implement code, design screens, modify backend APIs, or approve production submit alone.
boundaryAssertions.externalRuntimeModificationBoundary: Does not directly call or modify external platform/runtime source, agent image, entrypoint, or runtime configuration.
boundaryAssertions.humanGateBoundary: Escalates production submit, payment, PII, external messaging, legal/terms, and accept-risk-after-gate-failure.
